title: TV for dogs booms but are they watching?
summary: Pet TV channels are becoming an increasingly popular industry, but evidence remains unclear on whether dogs actually engage with the content. The boom in dog-focused programming reflects growing pet entertainment investment. Research suggests actual viewership and engagement may be limited.
content: TV channels for dogs are multiplying but research is mixed on whether dogs are watching.

zh.title: 犬类电视热潮，但狗狗真的在看吗？
zh.summary: 宠物电视频道正成为日益流行的产业，但狗狗是否真正参与观看内容的证据仍不明确。犬类专项节目的热潮反映了宠物娱乐投资的增长。研究表明，实际收视率和参与度可能有限。

title: Stock futures slip as traders monitor fragile ceasefire between U.S. and Iran: Live updates
summary: Stock futures dipped as markets monitored the U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement, despite ongoing market relief. President Trump agreed to a two-week ceasefire with Iran. Traders remain cautious despite the positive development, indicating fragile investor sentiment.
content: Stocks extended their rally on Thursday after President Donald Trump agreed to a two-week ceasefire with Iran.

zh.title: 股指期货下滑，交易员监控美伊脆弱停火：实时更新
zh.summary: 当市场监控美伊停火协议时，股指期货下滑，尽管市场持续显示缓解。特朗普总统同意与伊朗实现两周停火。尽管这一积极发展，交易员仍保持谨慎态度，表明投资者情绪脆弱。

title: EU fingerprint and photo travel rules come into force
summary: The European Union's Entry/Exit System went into effect, requiring fingerprint and photo checks for travelers to 29 countries. The long-delayed system significantly changes travel procedures for UK passengers and others entering the EU. The new rules affect border procedures across the European travel zone.
content: The EU's much-delayed Entry/Exit System will change the way UK passengers travel to 29 countries.

zh.title: 欧盟指纹和照片旅行规则正式生效
zh.summary: 欧盟入境/出境系统已生效，要求前往29个国家的旅客接受指纹和照片检查。这个长期延迟的系统大幅改变了英国乘客和其他进入欧盟旅客的旅行程序。新规则影响整个欧洲旅行区的边境程序。

title: ‘I feel pressured’: My husband has early Alzheimer’s and wants to visit Europe, but I’m terrified of flying. What should I do?
summary: A person whose husband has early Alzheimer's faces pressure to travel to Europe despite a severe flying phobia. The husband's memory remains intact, though he has experienced decline in executive function. The dilemma raises questions about caregiving, personal boundaries, and supporting a spouse with cognitive decline.
content: “My husband’s memory is still good, but he has lost some executive function.”

zh.title: "我感到压力很大"：我的丈夫患有早期阿尔茨海默病，想要访问欧洲，但我非常害怕飞行。我该怎么办？
zh.summary: 一个丈夫患有早期阿尔茨海默病的人面临去欧洲旅行的压力，但她有严重的飞行恐惧症。丈夫的记忆力保持完整，但他在执行功能上有所下降。这个困境引发了关于护理、个人界限和支持患有认知衰退的配偶的问题。

title: Trump says Iran 'better stop now' if it's charging oil tankers fees to go through Strait of Hormuz
summary: President Trump issued a warning to Iran to cease charging fees on oil tankers transiting the Strait of Hormuz. The Strait is a critical global shipping route for oil. Trump's statement reflects tensions over Iranian revenue collection from international commerce.
content: President Donald Trump said that Iran "better stop now" if it's charging fees to oil tankers passing through the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 特朗普表示，如果伊朗向油轮收费通过霍尔木兹海峡，伊朗"最好现在就停止"
zh.summary: 总统特朗普向伊朗发出警告，要求其停止对通过霍尔木兹海峡的油轮收费。该海峡是全球石油运输的关键航道。特朗普的声明反映了伊朗从国际贸易中征收收入的紧张局势。

title: Friday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: U.S. stocks extended gains on Thursday as traders expressed optimism about the U.S.-Iran ceasefire holding. The Dow Jones Industrial Average turned positive for the year. The relief rally reflects cautious investor sentiment dependent on geopolitical developments.
content: Stocks continued their relief rally on Thursday as traders hoped the U.S.-Iran ceasefire would stick. The Dow Industrials turned positive for 2026.

zh.title: 周五的重大股市故事：下一个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 周四美国股票继续上涨，交易员对美国-伊朗停火协议的持久性表示乐观。道琼斯工业平均指数全年转为正值。这种缓解性上涨反映了谨慎的投资者情绪，取决于地缘政治发展。

title: Cramer explains the divergence in tech stocks – and why software may continue to lag
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer analyzed diverging performance between hardware and software technology stocks, with Intel gaining while Salesforce and Adobe struggled. The divergence reflects different market dynamics within the tech sector. Cramer predicted software stocks may continue underperforming amid current market conditions.
content: Jim Cramer marveled at the divergent fates of technology stocks — from hardware winners like Intel to software losers like Salesforce and Adobe.

zh.title: 克莱默解释科技股分化 - 以及为什么软件可能继续落后
zh.summary: 美国全国广播公司商业频道的吉姆·克莱默分析了硬件和软件技术股之间的差异表现，英特尔上升而Salesforce和Adobe苦苦挣扎。这种分化反映了科技部门内不同的市场动态。克莱默预测在当前市场条件下，软件股可能继续表现不佳。

title: Hot in the city: Energy crisis tests Singapore's air-con addiction
summary: Rising energy prices are straining Singapore's heavy air-conditioning dependence, highlighting Asia's vulnerability to energy cost shocks. Many Asian nations rely heavily on Gulf oil imports, intensifying the impact of price increases. The energy crisis forces a reckoning with the region's consumption patterns.
content: The rise in energy prices has hit Asia particularly hard as many nations are heavily reliant on Gulf oil.

zh.title: 城市炎热：能源危机考验新加坡的空调成瘾
zh.summary: 能源价格上升正在拉紧新加坡对空调的沉重依赖，凸显亚洲对能源成本冲击的脆弱性。许多亚洲国家严重依赖波斯湾石油进口，加剧了价格上升的影响。能源危机促使人们重新审视该地区的消费模式。

title: Netflix, big banks face a moment of truth as the Iran cease-fire rally meets earnings season
summary: Netflix and major financial institutions face crucial earnings reports amid market volatility tied to the Iran ceasefire. Options market volatility patterns suggest significant post-earnings price movements are expected. The convergence of earnings season and geopolitical developments creates elevated uncertainty for major stocks.
content: “Sawtooth” volatility pattern in options prices suggests a strong postearnings move for Netflix.

zh.title: Netflix和大银行面临真相时刻，伊朗停火反弹遇上财报季
zh.summary: Netflix和主要金融机构面临关键财报报告，同时面临与伊朗停火相关的市场波动。期权市场波动率模式表明预期会有显著的财报后价格波动。财报季和地缘政治发展的汇合为主要股票创造了升高的不确定性。

title: Has the cease-fire rally pushed stocks too high, too quickly?
summary: Market analysts debate whether the recent rally following the Iran ceasefire has driven stock prices too high too fast. Investing professionals express concerns about the fragility of the Middle East truce and its market implications. Opinions diverge on whether current valuations are sustainable.
content: Here’s what a handful of investing professionals say about the market’s rapid recovery — and the fragile Middle East truce.

zh.title: 停火反弹是否过度推高了股票价格？
zh.summary: 市场分析师争论伊朗停火后的反弹是否导致股价过快上涨。投资专业人士对中东休战的脆弱性及其市场影响表示担忧。对当前估值的可持续性意见不一。

title: Keir Starmer: 'I'm fed up' with Trump and Putin affecting UK energy costs
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer expressed frustration over Trump and Putin's influence on British energy costs. Iran has effectively blocked the Strait of Hormuz amid the conflict with the U.S. and Israel, creating an oil supply shortage. The closure is driving global energy prices higher, impacting Europe and the UK.
content: Iran has effectively closed the Strait of Hormuz in the war with the U.S. and Israel, creating an oil supply crunch and sending global energy prices soaring.

zh.title: 基尔·斯塔默说"我受够了"特朗普和普京影响英国能源成本
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默对特朗普和普京对英国能源成本的影响感到沮丧。伊朗在与美国和以色列的冲突中有效封锁了霍尔木兹海峡，导致石油供应短缺。这一封锁推高了全球能源价格，影响欧洲和英国。

title: The stock-market correction isn’t over yet. Here’s why the Iran cease-fire is actually a bad omen.
summary: A market analyst argues the stock-market correction remains incomplete, suggesting the Iran ceasefire rally is deceptively bearish. Market timers are overly optimistic about geopolitical resolution, while historically May begins the weakest six-month period for equities. The analysis cautions that current gains may be short-lived.
content: Market timers are too bullish about the outcome of the war — and May marks the start of the worst six-month stretch for markets historically.

zh.title: 股市调整还未结束。以下是伊朗停火为何实际上是坏兆头的原因。
zh.summary: 一位市场分析师辩称股市调整仍未完成，暗示伊朗停火反弹具有欺骗性的看跌信号。市场交易者对地缘政治解决过于乐观，而历史上五月开始是股票最疲弱的六个月。分析警告当前的涨幅可能短暂。

title: You have until April 15 to get this $8,000 Roth IRA freebie — no matter what your income
summary: U.S. taxpayers have until April 15 to contribute $8,000 to a Roth IRA, taking advantage of a tax break for 2025 regardless of their income level.
content: All U.S. taxpayers have until tax day — Wednesday, April 15 — to take advantage of the Roth IRA tax break for 2025, even if they think they earn too much.

zh.title: 4月15日之前可获得8000美元罗斯个人退休账户优惠——无论收入多少
zh.summary: 美国纳税人可在4月15日前为罗斯个人退休账户贡献8000美元，利用2025年的税收优惠，不受收入水平限制。

title: Here’s how much money Iran can make charging tolls on one-fifth of the world’s seaborne oil
summary: Iran could generate hundreds of millions to billions monthly in toll revenue from shipping through the Strait of Hormuz if traffic normalizes, though it currently remains near standstill.
content: Iran doesn’t stand to make much money with traffic through the Strait of Hormuz nearly at a standstill, but it can rake in billions in Chinese yuan, or hundreds of millions in U.S. dollars per month, once the transit of tankers through the crucial waterway is restored to normal.

zh.title: 伊朗通过向世界五分之一的海运石油征收通行费能赚多少钱
zh.summary: 如果通过霍尔木兹海峡的运输流量恢复正常，伊朗每月可通过通行费获得数亿至数十亿美元的收入，但目前流量仍几乎停滞。

title: Maine set to become first state with data center ban
summary: Maine is poised to become the first state with a data center ban, as more than a dozen other states consider similar measures due to concerns about energy prices and data center impacts.
content: More than a dozen other states are considering similar bans as fears around centers and high energy prices grow.

zh.title: 缅因州将成为首个实施数据中心禁令的州
zh.summary: 随着十多个其他州因能源价格和数据中心影响的担忧而考虑采取类似措施，缅因州即将成为首个实施数据中心禁令的州。

title: Costco shares rise on impressive monthly sales. We still have one big question
summary: Costco shares rose on strong monthly sales, though analysts still have key questions about the retailer's performance and near-term outlook.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: 好市多股价因月销售亮眼而上升，但我们仍有一个重大问题
zh.summary: 好市多股价因强劲的月度销售而上升，但分析师对这家零售商的表现和近期前景仍有关键问题。

title: Amazon debuts Masters coverage, becoming the golf tournament's fourth-ever media partner
summary: Amazon is making its debut as the fourth-ever media partner for the Masters golf tournament, offering two hours of exclusive coverage during its first year.
content: Amazon will have two hours of exclusive Masters coverage Thursday and Friday in its debut year as a media partner for the prestigious golf tournament.

zh.title: 亚马逊首次推出美国大师赛报道，成为该高尔夫锦标赛历史上第四个媒体合作伙伴
zh.summary: 亚马逊作为美国大师赛历史上第四个媒体合作伙伴首次亮相，在第一年提供两小时的独家报道。

title: DOJ launches probe into NFL over media rights packages and antitrust concerns
summary: The Department of Justice is investigating the NFL's media rights packages and potential antitrust violations, citing concerns about consumer affordability across various platforms.
content: The Department of Justice is raising concerns about the NFL's offerings across various platforms and affordability of consumers.

zh.title: 美国司法部对NFL媒体版权包和反垄断问题启动调查
zh.summary: 司法部正在调查NFL的媒体版权包和潜在的反垄断违规行为，理由是对消费者在各种平台上可负担性的担忧。

title: Florida AG opens probe into OpenAI ahead of potential IPO
summary: Florida Attorney General James Uthmeier has launched an investigation into OpenAI and ChatGPT as the AI company prepares for a potential IPO that could value it at $1 trillion.
content: Florida AG James Uthmeier launched an investigation into OpenAI and ChatGPT, as the AI firm prepares for an IPO that could value it at up to $1 trillion.

zh.title: 佛罗里达州检察长在OpenAI潜在IPO前启动调查
zh.summary: 佛罗里达州检察长詹姆斯·乌特迈耶对OpenAI和ChatGPT启动调查，该AI公司正在为估值可能达到1万亿美元的IPO做准备。

title: Here’s how much weight-loss drugs Wegovy, Zepbound and Foundayo cost — and how to pick the best GLP-1 for you
summary: As the GLP-1 market rapidly expands, a cost comparison of popular weight-loss medications including Wegovy, Zepbound, and Foundayo helps consumers identify the most affordable option.
content: The GLP-1 market is growing fast. Here’s how much the most popular medications will cost you.

zh.title: 减肥药物Wegovy、Zepbound和Foundayo的成本对比——以及如何为你选择最佳GLP-1
zh.summary: 随着GLP-1市场的快速扩张，流行的减肥药物（包括Wegovy、Zepbound和Foundayo）的成本对比帮助消费者找到最经济实惠的选择。

title: Tesla may take another stab at making a cheap EV as the competition heats up
summary: Tesla is reportedly developing a small electric SUV in early stages, representing a return to new product launches after years without a new vehicle as EV competition intensifies.
content: A small electric SUV is reportedly in the early stages of development at Tesla, after years without a new product launch.

zh.title: 特斯拉可能重新尝试制造廉价电动汽车，因为竞争加剧
zh.summary: 据报道，特斯拉正在开发一款小型电动SUV，处于早期阶段，这代表着在多年没有推出新车型后重新启动新产品发布，因为电动汽车竞争加剧。

title: Automatic U.S. military draft registration planned by December, filing shows
summary: The U.S. is planning automatic military draft registration by December, according to a filing released weeks after the U.S. and Israel launched military operations against Iran.
content: The proposed timetable for automatic military draft registration came weeks after the U.S. and Israel launched a war against Iran.

zh.title: 提交文件显示美国计划在12月前实施自动征兵登记
zh.summary: 根据一份提交文件，美国计划在12月前实施自动征兵登记，该文件是在美国和以色列对伊朗进行军事行动数周后发布的。

title: OpenAI pauses UK data centre deal over energy costs and regulation
summary: OpenAI has paused its UK data centre project due to energy cost and regulatory concerns, threatening Britain's ambitions to position itself as an AI superpower.
content: The project was part of a package of tech investment promising the UK could become an AI superpower.

zh.title: OpenAI因能源成本和监管问题暂停英国数据中心交易
zh.summary: OpenAI因能源成本和监管问题暂停了其英国数据中心项目，这威胁到英国将自己定位为人工智能超级大国的雄心。

title: Meta released a new AI model this week. JPMorgan sees it as a turning point for the stock
summary: Meta's release of a new AI model boosted its stock price, with JPMorgan viewing the announcement as a turning point that signals further gains as investor confidence in Meta's AI strategy strengthens.
content: Meta popped after it released its AI model on Wednesday, suggesting the stock has more room to run as investor confidence in its AI push grows, per JPMorgan.

zh.title: Meta本周发布新AI模型。摩根大通认为这是股票的转折点
zh.summary: Meta发布新AI模型提振了股价，摩根大通将该公告视为转折点，预示着随着投资者对Meta AI战略信心增强，股价将进一步上涨。

title: Caution still prevails even during second-day rally following explosive gains Wednesday
summary: Markets extended gains into a second day following Wednesday's explosive rally, but analysts warn of continued volatility as investors assess how the U.S.-Iran ceasefire might unfold.
content: Expect more choppiness ahead, analysts warned, as investors try and discern how the U.S.-Iran ceasefire might play out.

zh.title: 周三爆涨后第二天反弹中仍需谨慎
zh.summary: 市场在周三爆炸性反弹后连续第二天延续涨幅，但分析师警告称，随着投资者评估美国-伊朗停火可能如何展开，波动性将继续存在。

title: Disney plans layoffs of as many as 1,000 employees
summary: Disney is planning a new wave of cost-cutting measures that could include as many as 1,000 employee layoffs under new CEO Josh D'Amaro.
content: Disney is planning a new phase of cost cutting, including as many as 1,000 layoffs, under new CEO Josh D'Amaro, according to a person familiar with the matter.

zh.title: 迪士尼计划裁员多达1,000名员工
zh.summary: 在新任CEO乔什·达马罗的领导下，迪士尼正计划新一轮成本削减措施，可能包括裁员多达1,000名员工。

title: The Strait of Hormuz is not open as Iran controls access after ceasefire, UAE oil CEO says
summary: UAE oil CEO Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber warned that Iran's control of access to the Strait of Hormuz after the ceasefire threatens global oil supplies and demands full passage reopening.
content: Sultan Ahmed Al Jaber demanded a full reopening of the strait, warning that the oil supply disruption will increase if Iran maintains control of the passage.

zh.title: 伊朗在停火后控制荷美兹海峡通道，阿联酋石油首席执行官表示该海峡并未开放
zh.summary: 阿联酋石油首席执行官苏丹·艾哈迈德·阿尔·贾比尔警告称，停火后伊朗对荷美兹海峡通道的控制威胁全球油气供应，并要求充分开放通航。

title: Individual investors sat out yesterday’s stock-market rally — and made this move instead
summary: While institutional investors drove Wednesday's stock market rally, retail investors used the opportunity to sell positions and cash out their gains.
content: While institutional investors drove Wednesday’s rally, retail investors took it as an opportunity to cash out.

zh.title: 散户投资者没有参与昨日股市上涨——转而采取了这一行动
zh.summary: 虽然机构投资者推动了周三的股市上涨，但散户投资者利用这个机会抛售头寸并套现收益。

title: The average tax refund is over $3,500 — and you’ve get less than a week to file
summary: With average tax refunds exceeding $3,500, Americans have less than a week to file their returns as the IRS has received 1 million fewer filings than the same period last year.
content: So far, the IRS has received 1 million fewer tax returns than at the same point last year.

zh.title: 平均税款退款超过3500美元——你还有不到一周的时间提交申报

title: Meta commits to spending additional $21 billion with CoreWeave as AI costs keep rising
summary: Meta is committing an additional $21 billion to CoreWeave for AI infrastructure deployment from 2027 to 2032, reflecting escalating capital requirements for advanced AI development. This massive investment underscores how critical and expensive computational resources have become in the competitive AI landscape.
content: Meta's additional spending commitments with CoreWeave will be deployed from 2027 to 2032.

zh.title: Meta承诺额外投入210亿美元与CoreWeave合作，因AI成本持续上升
zh.summary: Meta承诺从2027年到2032年额外投入210亿美元用于与CoreWeave合作的AI基础设施部署，反映了先进AI开发对资本需求的不断增加。这项巨大投资强调了计算资源在竞争激烈的AI领域中已经变得多么关键和昂贵。

title: Meta's long-awaited AI model is finally here. But can it make money?
summary: Meta has released its first major AI model in a year, but now faces the critical challenge of converting this technology into a profitable business. The success of Meta's AI strategy depends on finding viable monetization paths for the model.
content: After releasing its first major AI model in a year, Meta now has to figure out how to turn it into a business.

zh.title: Meta期待已久的AI模型终于推出。但它能赚钱吗？
zh.summary: Meta发布了一年来的首个重大AI模型，但现在面临将这项技术转化为盈利业务的关键挑战。Meta的AI战略成功取决于为该模型找到可行的变现路径。

title: Oil prices tick higher but stay below $100 a barrel on concerns about a ‘fragile’ cease-fire
summary: Oil prices have risen but remain below $100 per barrel as traders worry the Iran ceasefire is unstable and shipping through the Strait of Hormuz remains restricted. The cautious market sentiment reflects uncertainty about whether the geopolitical truce will hold and normalize global energy supplies.
content: Traders wary that traffic through the Strait of Hormuz is still restricted.

zh.title: 由于对"脆弱"停火的担忧，油价小幅上升但仍保持在每桶100美元以下
zh.summary: 由于交易员担心伊朗停火不稳定且霍尔木兹海峡的海运仍受限制，油价已上升但仍保持在每桶100美元以下。谨慎的市场情绪反映了对地缘政治休兵是否能够维持并恢复全球能源供应正常化的不确定性。

title: JPMorgan upgrades a key financial stock that has gotten hit in 2026
summary: JPMorgan upgraded Capital One Financial, citing the bank's attractive valuation after a 2026 decline and its demonstrated ability to manage a weakening consumer environment. The upgrade reflects confidence in the company's financial resilience despite economic headwinds.
content: The bank upgraded its rating on Capital One Financial, citing its cheaper valuation after a fall in 2026 and ability to manage a potentially weaker consumer.

zh.title: 摩根大通上调在2026年表现不佳的关键金融股
zh.summary: 摩根大通上调第一资本财务公司，引用该银行在2026年下跌后的吸引力估值及其在应对消费环境恶化方面的能力。此次上调反映了对该公司在经济逆风中财务复原力的信心。

title: Family offices piled into oil after capital dried up. The recent rally has made for big gains
summary: Ultra-wealthy family offices have significantly increased oil and gas investments as ESG pressures drove traditional private equity firms away from the sector. The recent surge in oil prices has generated substantial returns for these family office investors.
content: After ESG pressures forced private equity investors out of oil and gas, investment firms of ultra-wealthy families stepped up.

zh.title: 资本枯竭后家族办公室大举涌入石油市场。近期反弹带来巨大收益
zh.summary: 由于环保、社会和治理压力将传统私募股权公司赶出该行业，超富有家族办公室显著增加了石油和天然气投资。最近油价的飙升为这些家族办公室投资者带来了可观的回报。

title: These signals will make or break the Iran cease-fire — and oil prices
summary: The stability of the Trump-Iran truce remains uncertain, with key signals determining whether the ceasefire holds and how dramatically oil markets will respond. Investors should be prepared to adjust positions in oil and emerging market stocks as the geopolitical situation develops.
content: Ride the “war’s over” rally — but the reality of the Trump-Iran truce suggests being ready to sell oil and emerging markets.

zh.title: 这些信号将决定伊朗停火是否成败——以及油价
zh.summary: 特朗普-伊朗休战的稳定性仍不确定，关键信号将决定停火是否能维持以及石油市场的反应幅度。投资者应准备好根据地缘政治局势的发展调整石油和新兴市场股票的头寸。

title: ‘Our FICO score is excellent’: My husband and I are in our 70s. How do we raise $10,000 for a new roof?
summary: A retired couple with strong credit seeks financing options for a $10,000 roof replacement while managing existing debt including a $30,000 home equity line and $15,000 car loan. The article addresses financial strategies for seniors with limited income seeking to fund home improvements.
content: “We currently have a home equity line of credit in the amount of $30,000 and a car loan of $15,000.”

zh.title: "我们的FICO信用评分很好"：我和丈夫都在70多岁。我们如何筹集1万美元来更换屋顶？
zh.summary: 一对信用良好的退休夫妇正在寻求融资方案来进行1万美元的屋顶更换，同时处理现有债务，包括3万美元的房屋净值信用额度和1.5万美元的汽车贷款。该文章讨论了收入有限的老年人为家庭改善提供资金的财务策略。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Constellation Brands, Datadog, Occidental Petroleum, CoreWeave and more
summary: Multiple stocks including Constellation Brands, Datadog, Occidental Petroleum, and CoreWeave are showing significant premarket volatility. This market movement reflects varied investor sentiment across beverages, software, energy, and AI infrastructure sectors.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves in the premarket.

zh.title: 盘前涨跌幅最大的股票：Constellation Brands、Datadog、Occidental Petroleum、CoreWeave等
zh.summary: 包括Constellation Brands、Datadog、Occidental Petroleum和CoreWeave在内的多只股票显示出显著的盘前波动。这一市场走势反映了投资者对饮料、软件、能源和人工智能基础设施部门的不同看法。

title: Buy this semiconductor maker as AI data center boom continues, Stifel says
summary: Investment firm Stifel upgraded a semiconductor manufacturer to buy from hold, citing continued expansion of AI data center demand. The chipmaker stands to benefit from sustained capital spending by technology companies building AI infrastructure.
content: The investment firm upgraded the chipmaker to buy from hold.

zh.title: 随着AI数据中心热潮持续，Stifel建议买入这家半导体制造商
zh.summary: 投资公司Stifel将一家半导体制造商从持有升级为买入，理由是AI数据中心需求持续扩张。这家芯片制造商将受益于科技公司在构建AI基础设施上的持续资本支出。

title: Will UK petrol and diesel prices start going down?
summary: UK fuel prices have risen due to Middle East tensions, but the Iran ceasefire could trigger a decline in petrol and diesel costs. Consumer relief at the pump depends on whether the truce stabilizes and global oil supplies normalize.
content: UK petrol prices have risen because of the US-Israel war with Iran but the ceasefire could see prices drop.

zh.title: 英国汽油和柴油价格会开始下降吗?
zh.summary: 英国燃料价格因中东局势紧张而上升,但伊朗停火可能会导致汽油和柴油成本下降。消费者在加油站的价格缓解取决于停火是否稳定以及全球石油供应是否恢复正常。

title: You think Iran is only about oil? No, it’s also about your dinner table.
summary: The Iran situation extends beyond oil markets to affect global food prices through four key economic pressures on investor portfolios. Rising grocery costs could materialize later in 2026 as supply chain and inflation impacts take hold.
content: Four chokeholds are squeezing investor portfolios. Here’s what to do before your grocery bill proves it in October.

zh.title: 你认为伊朗只与石油有关?不,它也关乎你的餐桌。
zh.summary: 伊朗局势超越石油市场,通过对投资者投资组合的四个关键经济压力影响全球食品价格。随着供应链和通胀影响的到来,杂货成本的上升可能在2026年晚些时候实现。

title: OpenAI halts UK stargate project amid regulatory and energy price concerns
summary: OpenAI has paused its UK Stargate AI infrastructure project, originally announced in September with Nvidia and Nscale as partners, due to regulatory challenges and energy cost concerns. The halt reflects growing scrutiny of massive AI infrastructure investments in the UK.
content: The major AI infrastructure was announced in September in partnership was with Nvidia and Nscale.

zh.title: OpenAI因监管和能源价格担忧暂停英国星际之门项目
zh.summary: OpenAI已暂停其英国星际之门AI基础设施项目,该项目最初在9月宣布,与Nvidia和Nscale为合作伙伴,由于监管挑战和能源成本担忧。这一暂停反映了对英国大规模AI基础设施投资日益增长的审查。

title: Citi backs European bank stocks after 'overblown' sell off - here are its top three picks
summary: Citigroup recommends European bank stocks following a significant recent selloff, arguing the market decline has been excessive. The Stoxx 600 Banks index is down modestly year-to-date but fell sharply during recent conflict before recovering.
content: The Stoxx 600 Banks index is down 1% year-to-date, after falling by as much as 10% during the depths of the conflict.

zh.title: 花旗在"过度"抛售后看好欧洲银行股 - 以下是其三大精选
zh.summary: 花旗集团在近期大幅抛售后推荐欧洲银行股，认为市场下跌幅度过大。Stoxx 600银行指数年初至今小幅下跌，但在最近冲突期间大幅下跌后随后回升。

title: Olympic skier Lindsey Vonn doesn't rule out the 2030 games: 'I would only do it if I could be fast'
summary: Olympic skier Lindsey Vonn has indicated she would consider competing in the 2030 Winter Olympics at age 45 if she remains capable of performing at a competitive level. Her potential return reflects her enduring athleticism and drive to remain elite.
content: Lindsey Vonn told CNBC Sport she's not ruling out a return to the Olympics in 2030, at age 45, if she can still perform at a high level.

zh.title: 奥运滑雪选手林赛·冯不排除参加2030奥运：'只要我还够快就会参加'

title: Lidl begins building its first ever pub
summary: German grocery chain Lidl is constructing its first pub in Northern Ireland, an unusual business expansion driven by the region's strict alcohol licensing laws. The venture represents an unconventional consequence of local regulatory requirements.
content: The development is an unusual consequence of Northern Ireland's strict licensing laws.

zh.title: 利德尔开始建设其有史以来第一家酒吧
zh.summary: 德国杂货连锁店利德尔正在北爱尔兰建设其首家酒吧，这是由该地区严格的酒精许可法驱动的不寻常业务扩展。该企业代表了当地监管要求的非常规后果。

title: Oil prices rise as traders eye fragile US-Iran ceasefire
summary: Oil prices fell on Wednesday following the announcement of a US-Iran ceasefire deal that includes reopening the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global crude supply route. This matters because disruptions to the strait significantly impact energy markets and global trade.
content: The cost of crude plunged on Wednesday after a deal was announced that includes the opening of the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 油价上涨，交易员关注美伊脆弱停火协议
zh.summary: 美伊停火协议宣布后，油价于周三下跌，该协议包括重新开放霍尔木兹海峡这一关键的全球原油供应路线。这很重要，因为海峡中断会对能源市场和全球贸易产生重大影响。

title: Europe stocks rebound to stall as U.S-Iran ceasefire comes under strain
summary: European stock markets are expected to open with mixed results as the recently agreed US-Iran ceasefire already shows signs of strain. This matters because geopolitical tensions significantly impact financial markets and investor confidence.
content: Shares in Europe are poised to open in mixed territory on Thursday, as the fragile truce agreed between the U.S. and Iran already shows signs of strain.

zh.title: 美伊停火协议面临压力，欧洲股市反弹停滞
zh.summary: 随着最近达成的美伊停火协议已经出现压力迹象，欧洲股市预期将以混合结果开盘。这很重要，因为地缘政治紧张局势对金融市场和投资者信心产生重大影响。

title: The food waste 'saints' feeding city's children
summary: Volunteers at the I Am Reusable food bank redistribute surplus food to schools, addressing food insecurity and waste in their community. This matters as a grassroots solution to childhood food security and environmental sustainability.
content: Janet Leng and Marian Hodgson volunteer at I Am Reusable food bank and redistribute food to schools.

zh.title: 食物浪费的"圣人"喂养城市儿童
zh.summary: "我是可重用"食物银行的志愿者将剩余食物重新分配给学校，解决其社区中的食物不安全和浪费问题。这很重要，因为这是一个解决儿童粮食安全和环保持续性的基层解决方案。

title: From war to weather: A 'super El Niño' event poses fresh risks to global food costs
summary: An unusually powerful El Niño weather event could emerge later in 2026, potentially worsening global food security and raising food costs. This matters because climate patterns directly impact agricultural production and food accessibility worldwide.
content: An unusually powerful El Niño weather event could take shape later this year, exacerbating global food security fears.

zh.title: 从战争到天气：强劲的厄尔尼诺事件对全球粮食成本构成新风险
zh.summary: 异常强劲的厄尔尼诺气候事件可能在2026年晚些时候出现，可能导致全球粮食安全恶化并提高粮食成本。这很重要，因为气候模式直接影响农业生产和全球粮食获取。

title: Trump says U.S. ready for 'next conquest,' warns military to remain near Iran until 'real agreement' is honored
summary: President Trump warned the military to maintain presence near Iran one day after the US and Iran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, signaling potential continued tensions. This matters because it raises questions about the durability of the diplomatic agreement.
content: The statement came a day after Washington and Tehran agreed to a two-week ceasefire brokered by Pakistan, which halted six weeks of fighting.

zh.title: 特朗普称美国为"下一场征服"做好准备，警告军队在"真实协议"得到兑现之前留在伊朗附近
zh.summary: 在美国和伊朗同意由巴基斯坦斡旋的两周停火协议一天后，特朗普总统警告军队保持在伊朗附近，表明可能继续存在紧张关系。这很重要，因为它引发了对外交协议持久性的质疑。

title: Oil prices resume gains after Iran accuses U.S. of breaching ceasefire deal
summary: Oil prices rose after Iran accused the US of violating elements of their ceasefire agreement, adding uncertainty to the fragile truce. This matters because energy markets are highly sensitive to geopolitical tensions and supply threats.
content: Oil markets rose after Iran accused the United States of violating elements of a two-week ceasefire agreement.

zh.title: 伊朗指责美国违反停火协议后，油价恢复上升
zh.summary: 伊朗指责美国违反停火协议的条款后，油价上升，为脆弱的停火增加了不确定性。这很重要，因为能源市场对地缘政治紧张局势和供应威胁高度敏感。

title: Iran oil shock stirs memories of 1997 Asian Financial Crisis — but here’s why history may not repeat itself
summary: The Iran-related disruption to the Strait of Hormuz is straining Asian economies through rising energy costs and weakening currencies, though analysts believe a repeat of the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis is unlikely. This matters because it shows both real economic impact and structural market differences.
content: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.

zh.title: 伊朗油价冲击引发1997年亚洲金融危机的回忆——但为什么历史可能不会重演
zh.summary: 伊朗相关的霍尔木兹海峡中断正在通过不断上升的能源成本和货币贬值来削弱亚洲经济，尽管分析师认为1997年亚洲金融危机不太可能重演。这很重要，因为它展示了真实的经济影响和结构性的市场差异。

title: 'Poorly run, piece of ice': Trump targets Greenland again as Iran war deepens NATO rift
summary: President Trump has renewed interest in acquiring Greenland while criticizing NATO, as the Iran conflict has exposed divisions within the security alliance. This matters because it highlights internal tensions affecting Western security cooperation.
content: Trump has set his eyes on Greenland again while venting frustration at NATO, as the diplomatic fallout from Iran war exposed rifts in the security alliance.

zh.title: "管理不善，冰雪之地"：特朗普再次瞄准格陵兰，伊朗战争加深北约分裂
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在批评北约的同时重新对收购格陵兰表示兴趣，因为伊朗冲突暴露了安全联盟内部的分歧。这很重要，因为它突出了影响西方安全合作的内部紧张关系。

title: Asia markets open mixed as investors assess fragile Iran-U.S. ceasefire deal
summary: Iran's parliamentary speaker alleged the U.S. breached the two-week ceasefire agreement, raising concerns about the deal's stability just hours after it was announced as Asian markets responded with mixed trading.
content: Iran's parliamentary speaker charged the U.S. of breaching the terms of the two-week ceasefire agreement.

zh.title: 伊朗-美国停火协议不稳定，亚洲股市涨跌互现
zh.summary: 伊朗议会主席指责美国违反了为期两周的停火协议，在协议宣布仅几小时后就引发了对协议稳定性的担忧，亚洲股市对此做出了混合的交易反应。

title: Inside India newsletter: Tariffs and Iran war threaten India's $100 billion garments export goal
summary: U.S. tariffs and the Iran conflict have severely impacted India's garment industry, driving up production costs and threatening the sector's $100 billion export target.
content: U.S. tariffs and the Iran war have battered India’s garment industry, raising costs, hitting exports, and dashing hopes of a recovery.

zh.title: 印度快讯：关税和伊朗战争威胁印度1000亿美元服装出口目标
zh.summary: 美国关税和伊朗冲突严重冲击了印度服装业，推高了生产成本，威胁到该行业1000亿美元的出口目标。

title: 22,000 students told to pay back 'mis-sold' maintenance loans
summary: Over 22,000 students have been notified they must repay maintenance and childcare loans because their courses were never eligible for such funding.
content: Those affected have been told their courses were never eligible for maintenance or childcare loans

zh.title: 2.2万名学生被要求偿还"错误推销"的维持贷款
zh.summary: 超过2.2万名学生已被通知，由于其课程从未符合此类贷款的资格，他们必须偿还维持和托儿贷款。
